---
title: "Images of BoHeMIa"
description: "Math For All (MFA) Conference Poster on Bounded Height Matrices of Integers"
author: ""
resources: 
  - MFA_poster.pdf
  - bohemia.png
date: "2024-04"
categories: [Python] 
image: "bohemia.png"     
link: "MFA_poster.pdf"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---
